mapper.insert: INSERT INTO D_SPIDERLINK.FWK_BATCH_HIS ( BATCH_APP_ID, INSTANCE_ID, BATCH_DATE, BATCH_EXECUTE_SEQ, LOG_DTIME, RES_RT_CODE, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID ) VALUES ( #{batchAppId}, #{instanceId}, #{batchDate}, #{batchExecuteSeq}, TO_CHAR(SYSTIMESTAMP, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISSFF3'), 'RUNNING', #{lastUpdateUserId} )
mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM D_SPIDERLINK.FWK_BATCH_HIS WHERE BATCH_APP_ID = #{batchAppId} AND BATCH_DATE = #{batchDate} AND RES_RT_CODE = 'SUCCESS'
SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM D_SPIDERLINK.FWK_BATCH_HIS WHERE BATCH_APP_ID = #{batchAppId} AND BATCH_DATE = #{batchDate} AND RES_RT_CODE = 'RUNNING'
SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM D_SPIDERLINK.FWK_BATCH_HIS WHERE BATCH_APP_ID = #{batchAppId} AND BATCH_DATE = #{batchDate} AND RES_RT_CODE = 'SUCCESS'
